biography.value:
Caelith Dunivar — Keeper of Foreign Correspondence

The Yeomanry civic post that reads, classifies, and replies to incoming political communication from outside the republic. Reports to the Senior Auditor, not the Spokesman — the Audit Hall is institutionally insulated from the Council's factional shifts.

Late fifties, lean, gray hair worn short, scholar's black coat. A small brass quill-pin at the collar (twenty years' service). Walks deliberately. Eyes that catalog before they meet yours.

Voice

Soft, deliberate. Speaks as if every sentence is going on a record. Uses the formal Yeomanry plural in public; switches to "I" only in private, with people he has decided to trust.

Combat behavior — Phase 1

He will not fight the party in Phase 1, even if pressed. Combat with him would either resolve the campaign in his favor (he is significantly more dangerous than he reads) or cost the party every political asset Phase 2 depends on. If the party turns on him, he disengages with Cunning Action, retreats from the room, and Phase 2 is unrecoverable.

The statblock exists for two reasons: so the party feels the right danger if they read him with Insight in the right moment, and so the GM can deploy him as a backstop if Phase 2 demands it.

Statblock summary (CR 8, PB +4)

AC 17 · HP 127 · Speed 30 ft.

STR 11 (+0) · DEX 18 (+4) · CON 16 (+3) · INT 15 (+2) · WIS 14 (+2) · CHA 18 (+4)

Saves: DEX +8, INT +6, CHA +8.

Skills: Deception +12, Insight +6, Investigation +6, Perception +6, Persuasion +8, Sleight of Hand +8, Stealth +8.

Senses: Passive Perception 16. Languages: None.

Traits

  • Cunning Action (Recharge 5–6). Bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.
  • Whisper Network. While in any settlement where he has contacts, gains advantage on Investigation and Persuasion checks to gather information.
  • Words Like Knives (1/Turn). When Caelith succeeds on a Deception or Persuasion check in social combat (2024 rules), he imposes Disadvantage on the target's next Insight or Persuasion check against him.
  • Sneak Attack (1/Turn). +14 (4d6) damage on a weapon attack if he has advantage or an ally is within 5 ft of the target.
  • Uncanny Dodge. Reaction to halve damage from an attack he can see.
  • Evasion. Takes no damage on successful Dex saves, half on a failed save.
  • Silver Tongue. When Caelith rolls below a 10 on a Deception or Persuasion check, he treats it as a 10.

Actions

  • Cutting Words. One creature within 30 ft must make a DC 16 Wisdom save. On a failed save: 14 (4d6) psychic damage and Frightened of Caelith until the end of its next turn.
  • Dagger. Ranged Attack +8, range 20/60. Hit: 1d4+3 piercing.
  • Rapier. Melee Attack +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8+4 piercing.
  • Sneak Attack (rider). +14 (4d6) damage on a successful weapon attack with advantage or an ally within 5 ft of the target.

For full mechanical automation, drag matching weapon and feature items from the dnd5e SRD compendium and attach them to this actor. The shipped JSON keeps actions as text only.

Source

Blooming Rot, Part 2 — Phase 1. See the Caelith Dunivar journal for full profile, public/private speech text, and what he will and will not tell the party.
